novel_features.name: Release Sync
novel_features.description: Automatically detect and fetch new file tranches as the government releases them on a rolling basis
novel_features.rationale: Only possible with a local manifest store that can diff against the remote catalog
novel_features.why_it_matters: Agents monitoring the PURSUE release schedule get notified of new files without manual checking

novel_features.name: What's New
novel_features.description: See exactly which files were added since your last sync — the 'what did I miss' command for rolling releases
novel_features.rationale: Requires tracking sync timestamps and diffing against the local manifest
novel_features.why_it_matters: When an agent needs to check for new declassified files without re-scanning the entire archive

novel_features.name: Cross-Agency Timeline
novel_features.description: View a chronological incident timeline spanning 1944-2025 across all four agencies
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining incident dates across agency boundaries in the local store
novel_features.why_it_matters: Researchers need to see the full picture: FBI case from 1947 next to a DoW mission report from 2024

novel_features.name: Paired File Discovery
novel_features.description: Find video-PDF pairings so researchers can locate the document that accompanies a video and vice versa
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining video_pairing and pdf_pairing fields across file records
novel_features.why_it_matters: 41 videos have paired documents — this command surfaces the connections instantly

novel_features.name: Download Manager
novel_features.description: Download files with resume support, verification, and progress tracking for the 2.3 GB archive
novel_features.rationale: Requires tracking download state per file in the local store
novel_features.why_it_matters: The archive is 2.3 GB of PDFs alone — agents need reliable batch downloads with state tracking

novel_features.name: Agency Breakdown
novel_features.description: See which agency contributed what: file counts, types, date ranges, and coverage analysis
novel_features.rationale: Requires aggregating across the full manifest with group-by queries
novel_features.why_it_matters: Quick answer to 'what did the FBI release vs NASA vs DoW'

novel_features.name: Location Intelligence
novel_features.description: Aggregate incidents by geographic location for mapping and spatial analysis
novel_features.rationale: Requires grouping and counting across location fields in the local store
novel_features.why_it_matters: 25 incidents in Western US, 12 in Syria, 9 on the Moon — spatial patterns emerge from aggregation

narrative.headline: The declassified UAP file archive in your terminal — browse, search, and download 162+ files from the PURSUE initiative
narrative.value_prop: The first CLI for the War.gov/UFO declassified files portal. Search across all four agencies (DoW, FBI, NASA, State), download files with resume support, track new release tranches, and discover video-PDF pairings — all from a single binary with offline SQLite storage.
narrative.auth_narrative: No authentication required for browsing and searching the file manifest. File downloads from war.gov may require browser cookies due to Akamai bot protection — use `ufo auth login --chrome` to import cookies from your Chrome session.

quickstart.comment: Fetch the latest file manifest from the PURSUE archive
Search across titles, descriptions, and locations

troubleshoots.fix: Run `ufo auth login --chrome` to import browser cookies, then retry the download
Check internet connectivity. The manifest is fetched from GitHub. Run `ufo doctor` to verify.
New tranches are released every few weeks. Run `ufo sync` to check for updates.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when you need to browse, search, or download declassified UAP files from the War.gov PURSUE archive. Ideal for researchers tracking new releases, journalists investigating specific incidents, or agents that need structured access to government UFO data.

recipes.title: Find all Moon incidents
recipes.explanation: Surfaces Apollo-era lunar UAP observations from NASA files

recipes.title: Download all FBI files
recipes.explanation: Batch download with resume support for the 56 FBI contributions

recipes.title: Cross-agency timeline for the 1960s
recipes.explanation: See incidents across all agencies during the peak UFO era

recipes.title: Find video-document pairs
recipes.explanation: Discover which videos have accompanying PDF reports

recipes.title: Track new releases
recipes.explanation: Fetch latest manifest and see what's been added since last check
